message:
fix(context): honor minRelevanceScore config and fix misleading score labels

- Filter context bullets by relevanceScore >= config.minRelevanceScore
  instead of finalScore > 0, so the configured threshold is respected
- Display "relevance" and "confidence" separately in human/markdown
  output instead of a single misleading "score" label that showed
  effectiveScore while ranking used finalScore

Fixes #25

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
